summary.key_theme: Amazon 透過投入 10 億美元成立 AI 工程部門強化 AWS 競爭力，並受惠於零售數據強勁與分析師看好長期營收成長潛力。

bullish.title: Amazon (AMZN) Launches $1 Billion AI Engineering Unit Inside Customer Organizations
bullish.reason: AWS 投入 10 億美元成立 Forward Deployed Engineering 部門，透過派遣工程師駐點客戶端加速 AI 部署，展現其在雲端 AI 領域的強大執行力與客戶黏著度。

bullish.title: Amazon Stock On Watch As Prime Day Pull-Forward Meets 20% AWS Price Pop
bullish.reason: 美國銀行 (BofA) 維持買入評級與 310 美元目標價，看好強勁的零售數據與 AWS 價格調漲將顯著提升獲利能力。

bullish.title: Jeff Bezos’ Amazon May Hit Historic Milestone No Company Has Reached, Says Analyst
bullish.reason: 分析師預測 Amazon 有望在 2028 年成為首家年營收突破 1 兆美元的公司，長期成長前景備受市場看好。

bullish.title: From the Gas Pump to the Grill: Prime Introduces Summer Savings Just in Time for the Fourth of July
bullish.reason: 透過 Prime 會員夏季促銷活動，預計能進一步提升零售部門的用戶參與度與銷售額。

bearish.title: Amazon Stock in Focus -- Agrees to Pay $2.25 Million in FTC Settlement
bearish.reason: Amazon 與 FTC 達成 225 萬美元和解，加上澳洲面臨 Prime Video 相關訴訟，顯示公司在監管與法律合規方面持續面臨壓力。

bearish.title: NLRB Judge Rules Against Amazon in San Francisco Union Fight
bearish.reason: 勞資關係委員會 (NLRB) 法官裁定不利於 Amazon，儘管未來可能因政治變動而翻盤，但短期內對公司勞工政策形象造成負面影響。

bearish.title: Magnificent Seven stocks lose $2.3 trillion as AI fears mount
bearish.reason: 市場對 AI 資本支出過高產生疑慮，導致科技巨頭股價波動，反映出投資人對 AI 投資回報率的擔憂。

neutral.title: S&P 500, Nasdaq End Higher As Chipmakers Rally, While Dow Posts Best First Half In Five Years
neutral.reason: 整體市場表現強勁，Amazon 作為成分股隨大盤走勢波動，無特定公司層面利多。

neutral.title: "Magnificent Seven" Showdown: Amazon or Alphabet for Long-Term Investors?
neutral.reason: 僅為投資組合配置的比較分析，未對 Amazon 基本面產生直接影響。

neutral.title: Americans Bet Twice As Much On Sports Last Year As Amazon Earned
neutral.reason: 僅為數據對比分析，旨在說明博弈產業規模，對 Amazon 營運無實質影響。

neutral.title: Republic Business Credit Provides $2 Million E-Commerce ABL Facility to Emerging Retailer
neutral.reason: 僅涉及第三方賣家的融資活動，對 Amazon 自身財務影響微乎其微。

neutral.title: Levanta Research Finds 74% of Creators Send Affiliate Traffic to Multiple Shopping Destinations
neutral.reason: 產業研究報告，探討創作者流量分配趨勢，對 Amazon 營收影響中性。
